scripts.check:js: node --check src/settings.js && node --check src/timestamps.js && node --check src/native-timestamps.js && node --check src/comment-scoring.js && node --check src/comment-fetching.js && node --check src/content.js && node --check src/options.js && node --check scripts/prepare-package-sources.mjs
scripts.check: npm run check:js && npm run check:manifest
scripts.lint:firefox: npm run prepare:packages && NO_UPDATE_NOTIFIER=1 web-ext lint --source-dir dist/firefox
scripts.build:chrome: npm run prepare:packages && NO_UPDATE_NOTIFIER=1 web-ext build --source-dir dist/chrome --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --overwrite-dest --filename timestamp-player-youtube-chrome-{version}.zip
scripts.build:firefox: npm run prepare:packages && NO_UPDATE_NOTIFIER=1 web-ext build --source-dir dist/firefox --artifacts-dir web-ext-artifacts --overwrite-dest --filename timestamp-player-youtube-firefox-{version}.zip
scripts.build: npm run check && npm run lint:firefox && npm run build:chrome && npm run build:firefox
